mapper.insert: insert into sys_login_history (id, user_id, username, login_ip, user_agent, login_result, fail_reason, require_captcha, login_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent}, #{loginResult}, #{failReason}, #{requireCaptcha}, #{loginTime})
mapper.select: select login_ip, user_agent from sys_login_history where user_id = #{userId} and login_result = 'SUCCESS' and login_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) order by login_time desc
